name: lifeflow
description: Self-hosted personal task planner with 4-level hierarchy, 25+ views, and zero cloud dependencies

scripts.test:security: node --test --test-force-exit tests/security.test.js tests/idor-auth.test.js tests/auth-registration.test.js tests/csrf.test.js tests/cors.test.js tests/api-tokens.test.js tests/totp-2fa.test.js tests/2fa-extensive.test.js tests/https-proxy.test.js tests/multi-user.test.js tests/input-fuzzing.test.js tests/input-validation-comprehensive.test.js tests/sql-safety.test.js
